name: Chocolate Cake with Grand Marnier
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter in a double boiler. Set aside to cool slightly.
2. Beat yolks and 1 cup granulated sugar until smooth; stir in vanilla, Grand Marnier, and lemon juice. Blend in the chocolate mixture.
3. Beat egg whites in a large mixer bowl until soft peaks form. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar; beat until stiff peaks form.
4. Stir 1 cup of whites into the chocolate mixture, then fold in the remaining whites.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10 or 12 inch springform pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 250°C for 2 1/2 hours. (That's what is says, two and one-half hours.)
7. Cool completely on a rack before removing the pan.
8. Sprinkle cake with powdered sugar. Serve with whipped cream. Serves 10 to 12.
